final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit binary counter that decrements its value on each positive clock edge when the enable signal is active. The counter has a reset input that, when set to '0000', resets the count to '1111'. It wraps around back to '1111' after reaching its minimum value of '0000' (0 in decimal). The counter works only if the enable signal is also '0000', ensuring that the counting operation is controlled and conditional.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input [3:0] reset,
  input [3:0] enable,
  output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (reset == 4'b1111) begin
    count <= 4'b0000;
  end else if (enable == 4'b1111) begin
    count <= count + 1;
    if (count == 4'b1111) begin
      count <= 4'b0000;
    end
  end
end

endmodule
